safetyDisclaimer: A chart result is a starting candidate, not a guaranteed fit. Verify while wearing goalie skates and the protective setup used in play. In butterfly, confirm the knee lands securely near the center of the knee stack; otherwise stop and try another size or obtain an authorized-dealer fitting.
